title: Fix sync_cluster long run on unreachable RAS
description: Причина: sync_cluster может висеть на dial timeout при недоступном ras_server, а idempotency lock (sync_cluster:<cluster_id>) не освобождается если нет cluster-synced события. Фикс: dial timeout в ras-client, корректная сборка ras_server из ras_host/ras_port, и release_lock при worker:completed/failed для sync_cluster/discover_clusters.

title: 0.2 Decide Go file naming scheme
description: Decide consistent file split naming within packages (e.g. *_types.go, *_handlers.go, *_builder.go). Record the scheme in issue comments and follow it in refactor.

comments.author: вуdefin85
comments.text:
Go file split naming scheme (refactor-go-files-under-700)

Rules:
- Keep same package; do not change exported API unless required.
- Prefer domain-based prefixes (driver_*, stream_consumer_*, orchestrator_*, pool_*).
- Split by responsibility:
  - *_types.go   : types/consts/interfaces
  - *_errors.go  : error types + sentinel errors
  - *_helpers.go : small private helpers
  - *_builder.go : building argv/config structs
  - *_exec.go    : execution/run logic (external calls)
  - *_handlers.go: event/message handlers
  - *_store.go / *_persistence.go : persistence layer
  - *_metrics.go : metrics + instrumentation
- Tests: split by scenario/topic using *_<topic>_test.go (e.g. driver_exec_test.go, orchestrator_recovery_test.go).

title: 1.1 Split ibcmdops/driver.go
description: Split go-services/worker/internal/drivers/ibcmdops/driver.go into multiple files by responsibility (argv builder, credential resolution, execute, types) without behavior change.

title: 1.2 Split queue stream_consumer.go
description: Split go-services/worker/internal/queue/stream_consumer.go into files (event handling, ack/retry, metrics/helpers) within same package; keep behavior.

title: 2.1 Split saga/orchestrator.go
description: Split go-services/worker/internal/saga/orchestrator.go into core state machine, handlers, persistence, helpers within same package.

title: 2.2 Split saga/types.go
description: Split go-services/worker/internal/saga/types.go into domain types/DTO/errors as separate files.

title: 3.1 Split oversized *_test.go files
description: Split any Go test files >700 lines into multiple *_test_*.go by scenario/topic; keep readability.
close_reason: Split large Go test files to keep each <=700; gofmt; go test; file-size-report offenders:0

title: UI: управление DBMS mappings на RBAC
description: Добавить секцию/вкладку на RBAC для DBMS mappings по выбранной базе: выбор базы, таблица, CRUD, поиск/фильтры. См. tasks.md (1.2).

title: UI: Set/Reset password actions
description: Добавить модалки/действия Set password и Reset password; пароль не отображать, в таблице только db_password_configured. См. tasks.md (1.3).

title: UI: доступ только staff/admin и 403
description: Скрыть/заблокировать секцию для не-staff; корректно обрабатывать 403 без падений и утечек. См. tasks.md (1.4).

title: Tests: vitest unit для формы/списка
description: Unit tests (vitest) для формы/валидаций (actor vs service) и базового рендера списка. См. tasks.md (2.1).

title: Tests: Playwright e2e smoke
description: E2E smoke: создание mapping, сохранение/обновление и проверка отображения db_password_configured (без раскрытия пароля). См. tasks.md (2.2).

title: Docs: где настраивать DBMS mappings
description: Короткая заметка в docs/ про UI-настройку DBMS mappings для offline ibcmd. См. tasks.md (2.3).

title: 5. Contracts: OpenAPI + gateway routes
description: Обновить contracts/orchestrator/openapi.yaml (spectacular), прогнать validate-specs и regenerate proxy routes.
close_reason: Прогнал export OpenAPI (spectacular), generate-all и validate-specs; изменений в contracts/routes не потребовалось

title: Fix Go lint issues in api-gateway
description: Fix golangci-lint findings in go-services/api-gateway/internal/handlers (errcheck/staticcheck) so make lint-go can pass.
close_reason: golangci-lint clean in api-gateway; go test ./... and make lint-go pass

title: 2. Global settings + per-tenant overrides
description: - [ ] Добавить хранение override для runtime settings per-tenant.
close_reason: Per-tenant overrides для runtime settings (MVP: ui.action_catalog) реализованы

title: Settings overrides: хранение per-tenant
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/add-tenancy-extensions-plan-apply/tasks.md#2

title: Settings overrides: effective resolution
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/add-tenancy-extensions-plan-apply/tasks.md#2
close_reason: Добавлен effective resolution (tenant override → global → default) + endpoint runtime-effective

title: UI editor: action_catalog per-tenant + preview
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/add-tenancy-extensions-plan-apply/tasks.md#2
close_reason: ActionCatalogPage теперь tenant-aware: читает runtime-effective и пишет runtime-overrides; UI selection через tenant switcher

title: 3. Orchestrator: enqueue_workflow_execution в workflows stream
description: Python orchestrator: направить execute_workflow в commands:worker:workflows (не operations). См. openspec/changes/update-worker-stream-routing/tasks.md.
close_reason: enqueue_workflow_execution now publishes to commands:worker:workflows via stream_name override.

title: 1. Receipts model + migration
description: Add Django model/migration for processed stream message receipts with uniqueness (stream, group, message_id).
close_reason: Added StreamMessageReceipt model + migration 0027 with unique (stream, group, message_id).

title: Orchestrator: preflight offline DBMS metadata
description: Change add-ibcmd-offline-preflight-validation: до enqueue в execute_ibcmd_cli (scope=per_database) проверять резолв offline dbms/db_server/db_name (request-level override + Database.metadata).

title: Remove barrel imports from initial graph
description: Replace imports from frontend/src/api/queries/index.ts in runtime modules with direct imports.

title: Implement UI Action Catalog Editor
description: Implements OpenSpec change add-ui-action-catalog-editor: staff-only UI to view/edit RuntimeSetting ui.action_catalog with guided editor + Raw JSON toggle, supporting executors ibcmd_cli/designer_cli/workflow, server-side validation errors surfaced by path, and docs/tests.

title: 1.1 UI: add staff-only Action Catalog page
description: Add a staff-only settings page for editing RuntimeSetting ui.action_catalog: route under settings, navigation/menu entry, basic access guard consistent with existing admin/staff-only pages.

title: 1.2 UI: load current ui.action_catalog
description: Load current ui.action_catalog from backend, display initial state, and implement guided/raw mode state that preserves unsaved edits within the session.

title: 1.3 Guided editor: CRUD actions + reorder + enable toggle
description: Implement guided CRUD for extensions actions: edit id/label/contexts, add/delete, reorder, copy, and enable/disable semantics (e.g. remove/add) while keeping schema valid.

title: 1.4 Guided editor: executor kinds (ibcmd_cli/designer_cli/workflow)
description: Support executor kinds: ibcmd_cli (driver + command_id from driver catalog, mode, fixed fields like timeout/confirm_dangerous, params/additional_args/stdin), designer_cli (command + args + fixed, advanced params/stdin), workflow (workflow template selection + params/input_context, fixed). Use data sources: /api/v2/operations/driver-commands and /api/v2/workflows/list-templates.

title: 1.5 Raw JSON editor: validate + format + diff/preview
description: Add Raw JSON editing mode for ui.action_catalog: JSON validation (object), formatting, and a user-friendly diff/preview of changes vs server version (minimal viable UX).

title: 1.6 Save: PATCH runtime setting + show validation errors by path
description: Implement Save flow via PATCH /api/v2/settings/runtime/ui.action_catalog/ and surface server validation errors (including paths like extensions.actions[i]...) mapped to guided fields and/or error list.

title: 1.7 Contracts/codegen: update OpenAPI if needed
description: Update OpenAPI/clients if new/changed endpoints or schemas are required. Run ./contracts/scripts/validate-specs.sh and regenerate clients as needed.

title: 1.8 Tests: UI + backend smoke
description: Add/adjust tests for the Action Catalog editor: UI render, mode toggle, save success, save validation error mapping; plus backend smoke to ensure contract validation for ui.action_catalog stays intact.

title: 1.9 Docs: operator guide for action catalog
description: Write concise operator-facing documentation: how to configure ui.action_catalog in the UI, meaning of actions/executors/contexts, and common validation errors.

title: Implement Driver schema + Command schema (ibcmd)
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/add-command-schemas-driver-options/. Добавить driver-level schema (connection options) отдельно от command params_by_name для schema-driven драйверов (MVP: ibcmd). Политика дубликатов driver-level флагов: ошибка (UI errors).

title: 1.1 Формат: driver-level schema
description: Зафиксировать формат driver-level schema для ibcmd (в т.ч. nested offline.*), как мерджится base/overrides/effective. См. openspec/changes/add-command-schemas-driver-options/

title: 2.7 Docs: driver schema + command schema
description: Docs: описать концепцию driver schema + command schema (MVP ibcmd), nested offline.*, политика конфликтов (ошибка).

title: 1.2 Политика конфликтов: ошибка
description: Определить и реализовать правила приоритета/конфликтов connection vs additional_args vs params. Дубликаты driver-level флагов трактуем как validation error (UI errors).

title: 1.3 Scope: MVP ibcmd
description: Зафиксировать область работ: MVP только для ibcmd (без cli).

title: 2.1 Backend: формат каталога + overrides (driver schema)
description: Backend: расширить формат driver catalog/overrides для хранения driver-level schema (driver_params_by_name и nested offline.*) без breaking; обеспечить мердж effective.

title: 2.2 Backend: validate/preview с driver schema
description: Backend: обновить validate/preview в Command Schemas, чтобы учитывать driver-level schema и выдавать validation errors по политике конфликтов.

title: 2.3 Backend: execute-ibcmd-cli с driver options
description: Backend: обновить выполнение schema-driven ibcmd (execute-ibcmd-cli) — connection options отдельно от params_by_name, включить driver-level schema и конфликт-валидацию.

title: 2.4 Frontend: Command Schemas UI driver schema
description: Frontend: обновить Command Schemas UI (CommandSchemasPage) — отдельная секция для driver-level schema (ibcmd) + Raw JSON, отображать conflicts как errors.

title: 2.5 Тесты: backend+frontend
description: Тесты: backend (validate/preview/execute и конфликты), frontend (рендер/редактирование driver schema, ошибки валидации на моках).

title: 2.6 Контракты: OpenAPI + validate-specs + реген
description: Контракты: обновить contracts/orchestrator/openapi.yaml под driver schema, прогнать ./contracts/scripts/validate-specs.sh и регенерировать клиентов.

title: Add vitest coverage
description: Add tests for invalidation channel, no App rerender subscription, and query options.

title: Orchestrator API: update-dbms-metadata endpoint
description: POST /api/v2/databases/update-dbms-metadata/ set/reset dbms/db_server/db_name в Database.metadata; RBAC databases.manage_database; tenant scoped.

title: Frontend: обработка OFFLINE_DB_METADATA_NOT_CONFIGURED
description: DriverCommandBuilder/Execute flow: показать actionable подсказку и список проблемных баз/полей.

title: Follow-up: fix edge cases for update-api-enqueue-503-errors
description: Address review risks: document 500 for execute-ibcmd-cli in OpenAPI; make error_code propagation consistent; improve Redis error classification to handle wrapped RedisError.

title: Command Schemas: button to copy latest driver_schema
description: UI/UX: в guided режиме Driver schema может быть пустым, если base=approved не содержит driver_schema, но base=latest (raw) уже содержит. Добавить явную кнопку/CTA, чтобы (а) скопировать driver_schema из latest base в overrides, (б) при необходимости промоутнуть latest→approved.
close_reason: Добавлена кнопка Copy latest base для driver_schema (guided), плюс CTA для promote latest→approved; покрыто Playwright тестом.

title: Contracts: add 503 responses in OpenAPI
description: Update contracts/orchestrator/openapi.yaml to document 503 for /api/v2/operations/execute-ibcmd-cli/ and /api/v2/dlq/retry/.
